treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Three sessile non-bleeding polyps of benign appearance, a 1 cm adenoma polyp found, biopsies taken of rectal ulcer.
treatment_information.treatment_response: Findings included polyps and a rectal ulcer; biopsies were sent for histology.
Monitored closely, no further episodes of bleeding post-transfusion.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted due to blood in bowel movements.
Patient discharged to extended care facility.

patient_outcome.final_status: Ambulatory with assistance, mental status sometimes confused.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with Dr. ___ in GI clinic to schedule polyp removal and biopsy result follow-up.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Requires assistance or aid for ambulation.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient was monitored closely and reported no further episodes of bleeding post-transfusion.
